Scripts.OnEnter: if self.action == "INFO" then GameTooltip:SetOwner(self, "ANCHOR_TOP") GameTooltip:SetText(ICH_LANG["About the AddOn"]) elseif self.action == "HELP" then GameTooltip:SetOwner(self, "ANCHOR_TOP") GameTooltip:SetText(ICH_LANG["How To Use:"]) GameTooltip:AddLine("\n") GameTooltip:AddLine("- "..ICH_LANG["Find the mount you want to collect in the list and click the button for the difficulty you want to run on"], 1, 1, 1) GameTooltip:AddLine(ICH_LANG["to make sure it is updated."], 1, 1, 1) GameTooltip:AddLine("- "..ICH_LANG["When you are locked out for a mount on a particular difficulty, the button for that difficulty will be disabled."], 1, 1, 1) GameTooltip:AddLine("- "..ICH_LANG["A button will also be disabled for legacy raids completed on another difficulty since those lockouts"], 1, 1, 1) GameTooltip:AddLine(ICH_LANG["are shared across difficulties."], 1, 1, 1) GameTooltip:AddLine("- "..ICH_LANG["Waypoint tracking on the minimap may not always appear until you are in a specific zone."], 1, 1, 1) GameTooltip:AddLine(ICH_LANG["For example, an arrow pointing towards Throne of Thunder will only appear when you are on the Isle of Thunder"], 1, 1, 1) elseif self.action == "SEARCH" then GameTooltip:SetOwner(self:GetParent(), "ANCHOR_NONE") GameTooltip:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self:GetParent(), "TOPRIGHT") GameTooltip:SetText(ICH_LANG["Search Hints:"]) GameTooltip:AddLine("\n") GameTooltip:AddLine("- "..ICH_LANG["\"raid\" will show all mounts that can be collected from a raid"], 1, 1, 1) GameTooltip:AddLine("- "..ICH_LANG["\"10\" will show all mounts that can be collected from a legacy 10 player raid (Normal or Heroic)"], 1, 1, 1) GameTooltip:AddLine("- "..ICH_LANG["\"fel\" will show all mounts and instances that contain \"fel\" in the name"], 1, 1, 1) GameTooltip:AddLine("- "..ICH_LANG["\"mythic\" will show all mounts that can be obtained from a Mythic dungeon or raid"], 1, 1, 1) GameTooltip:AddLine("- "..ICH_LANG["\"lfr\" will show all mounts that can be obtained from Raid Finder (LFR) difficulty raids"], 1, 1, 1) GameTooltip:AddLine("- "..ICH_LANG["\"wotlk\" or \"wrath\" will show all mounts that can be obtained from Wrath of the Lich King instances"], 1, 1, 1) end GameTooltip:Show()
